use_cases: Selecting fare or ticket options in transportation or travel applications
Choosing pricing tiers in subscription-based SaaS platforms
Confirming selections in e-commerce checkout flows
Interactive pricing display for service-based businesses
Quick action triggers in form-based interfaces
ai_summary: A reusable button component with variant support (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options, commonly used as interactive elements within fare selection UIs. Supports Radix UI slot pattern for composition and includes accessibility features like focus-visible ring styling.
